meta.title: Onboard - Enterprise AI Agent Onboarding
meta.description: Enterprise-grade onboarding for AI agents. Give your agents context, access, and compliance from day one.

hero.subtitle: Stop deploying agents blindly. Give them context, access, and compliance from day one.

problem.subtitle: When you bring on a new employee, there's a process. When you deploy an AI agent? Total chaos.
problem.without1Desc: Slack DMs, shared passwords, zero audit trails
problem.without3Desc: No policy enforcement, regulators will notice
problem.without4Desc: Agent #10 is just as painful as agent #1
problem.with1Desc: Role-based permissions, secret rotation, full audit

solution.subtitle: Onboard makes deploying AI agents as structured and secure as hiring humans.
solution.contextDesc: Upload org structure, processes, culture docs. Agents start with full company context from day one.
solution.accessDesc: Role-based permissions, automated secret rotation, zero ad-hoc credential sharing. Security built-in.
solution.complianceDesc: Audit trails, policy enforcement, SOC2-ready logs. Regulators happy, security team happy.

howItWorks.step1Desc: Upload your org's context: culture docs, tool access policies, compliance requirements, team structure.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Set role-based permissions, connect integrations, define guardrails and escalation paths.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Launch agents with full context, proper access, and complete audit trails. Scale from 1 to 100.

who.ctoDesc: You need visibility, compliance, and standardized deployment before the board asks questions.
who.engineerQuote: "Each new agent takes 2 weeks to configure"
who.engineerDesc: You're tired of writing the same integration code. You want templates, guardrails, and one-click deploys.
who.securityQuote: "AI agents are our biggest blind spot"
who.securityDesc: You need audit trails, permission boundaries, and SOC2-ready logging for every agent interaction.

contact.subtitle: Pilot companies get hands-on setup support and influence the roadmap.
contact.benefit3: Shape the product with your feedback
contact.limitedDesc: Limited spots per cohort. Apply to join the next one.

contactForm.noSpam: No spam. We only reach out if there's a fit.
contactForm.skipDetails: Skip details, just add me to the waitlist
